title: viburnum odoratissimum var. arboricola
intro: Viburnum odoratissimum var. arboricola, also known as the 'Compact Sweet Viburnum', is a compact evergreen shrub native to China and Taiwan, characterized by its dense, small, dark green leaves and clusters of small, white flowers. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Viburnum odoratissimum var. arboricola include reducing inflammation and relieving stress, as well as providing antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
